name: TaskRabbit Gig Services Marketplace API
what_it_does: TaskRabbit (IKEA subsidiary) gig services marketplace REST API for on-demand skilled labor booking for furniture assembly, home repair, moving help, and handyman services. Enables AI agents to manage task creation and Tasker matching for on-demand home service booking automation, handle Tasker availability and skill search for service discovery automation, access price estimate and hourly rate data for gig service cost automation, retrieve task status and completion tracking for gig labor monitoring automation, manage IKEA task integration and post-purchase service booking for retail post-purchase automation, handle review and rating management for Tasker quality tracking automation, access task scheduling and time slot management for appointment automation, retrieve Tasker background check status for safety verification automation, manage promotional offer and coupon integration for marketplace incentive automation, and integrate TaskRabbit with IKEA retail, home services platforms, and moving companies for embedded on-demand labor.
use_cases: Booking IKEA assembly from post-purchase automation agents
Matching Taskers from on-demand labor automation agents
Scheduling home tasks from household management agents
Tracking task completion from service quality agents
not_for: Professional licensed trade work (use Angi for licensed contractors)
best_when: An IKEA retail partner, home services platform, or moving company wanting AI agents to automate on-demand Tasker booking, furniture assembly scheduling, home task management, and post-purchase service integration via TaskRabbit's marketplace.
avoid_when: TASKER WORKER CLASSIFICATION AND MISCLASSIFICATION RISK: TaskRabbit Taskers are classified as independent contractors; automated scheduling and direction of Tasker work that resembles employment (set hours, required uniform, exclusive work) creates worker misclassification risk under California AB5, FLSA, and state labor law. BACKGROUND CHECK STATUS VERIFICATION FOR HIGH-ACCESS TASKS: Automated task booking for high-access tasks (in-home access while homeowner absent, key holding, moving fragile/valuable items) must verify Tasker background check status; automated booking of unchecked Tasker for high-trust task creates safety liability. IKEA EXCLUSIVE INTEGRATION TERMS: TaskRabbit is IKEA subsidiary; embedded API integration for non-IKEA furniture assembly may conflict with IKEA partnership terms; verify TaskRabbit API partnership terms for non-IKEA retail or competitor furniture assembly use cases.

auth.notes: TaskRabbit uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2008 by Leah Busque as RunMyErrand. Acquired by IKEA Group 2017 for ~$700M. 700,000+ Taskers across US, Canada, UK, France, Germany, Spain, Portugal, and more. Furniture assembly (IKEA partnership), home repair, moving, cleaning, handyman. Background-checked Taskers. Competes with Handy, Angi, and Thumbtack for on-demand home services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-task booking fees and service charges
pricing.paid_tiers: Consumer: per-task marketplace fee (15% service charge); IKEA partnership: embedded pricing for post-purchase assembly; API partner: enterprise revenue share
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA (IKEA subsidiary). Per-task marketplace pricing. IKEA assembly partnership pricing. API partner enterprise revenue share. 700,000+ Taskers globally.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; task and Tasker queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required for task status

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — TASK STATUS REQUIRES POLLING: TaskRabbit does not support webhooks; automated task completion, Tasker en route, and booking confirmation status require scheduled polling; implement polling aligned with task urgency and customer communication timing

IKEA PARTNERSHIP EXCLUSIVITY CONTEXT: TaskRabbit is IKEA subsidiary with strategic focus on IKEA furniture assembly; API partnerships for non-IKEA retail or competing furniture brand assembly may conflict with IKEA partnership terms; validate use case with TaskRabbit API partnership team before building competitor retail assembly automation

WORKER MISCLASSIFICATION BEHAVIORAL BOUNDARIES: Automated task scheduling and direction via TaskRabbit must stay within independent contractor engagement norms; avoid automated workflows that set fixed schedules, require exclusive availability, or mandate specific work attire that crosses into employment relationship under AB5 or state labor law

TASKER AVAILABILITY REAL-TIME MATCHING: Automated task booking must check real-time Tasker availability for requested date/time and task category; Tasker availability is dynamic; automated booking without availability confirmation creates booking unavailability and customer expectation failure

GDPR FOR EU TASKER AND CUSTOMER DATA: TaskRabbit operates in EU (UK, France, Germany, Spain); automated workflows involving EU Tasker and customer data must comply with GDPR data processing requirements; cross-border data transfer between US API and EU TaskRabbit operations requires appropriate GDPR transfer mechanism

HIGH-VALUE ITEM TASK SPECIAL TERMS: Automated task booking for moving, art installation, or fragile high-value item handling may require TaskRabbit premium task category; standard task booking for high-value items creates Tasker liability mismatch; verify task category and Tasker coverage terms for high-value item handling automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Gig services marketplace. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/UK/CA. Customer PII, Tasker data, and task booking information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Gig marketplace. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/UK/CA. Customer PII and Tasker data.
